heading: Modify IP Access List Entries
body:
**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI

You can't modify IP access list entries with the Atlas CLI.
Select a different interface to learn how to modify IP access
list entries.

**Api:**

Atlas Administration API

You can use the Atlas Administration API to [modify
existing IP access list entries](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-createprojectipaccesslist).

**Ui:**

Atlas UI

If it isn't already displayed, click the
IP Access List tab.

Click Edit for the entry you want to modify.

You can modify the IP address or CIDR (Classless Inter-Domain Routing) block of the entry and the
comment associated with the entry. If the entry is temporarily
added, Atlas displays the remaining time until it will
remove the entry and a dropdown to modify the duration of the
IP access list entry or convert it to a permanent entry.

> **Note:** You can't change a permanent IP access list entry to be
> temporary.
